title: tragacantha skythropos
intro: Tragacantha skythropos, also known as the milk thistle plant, is a biennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. Its seeds contain a compound called silymarin, which has potent medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of tragacantha skythropos include liver protection, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, capsule, or extract, and is often used to support liver health and alleviate symptoms of jaundice and liver disease.
